title: fix_artifact
description: Record produced by the fixer for one cycle: what failed, what was changed, and whether a human decision is required.

summary_title.description: One-line description of what this cycle did (e.g. 'Fixed nil deref in run handler exit-code path').

summary_markdown.description: Markdown narrative: which tests failed, the root cause, and the change applied (per file). Goes into the report.

files_changed.description: Every file the fixer edited this cycle, repo-relative. Empty if no edit was made (e.g. needs_decision=true).

fixed_tests.description: Tests the fixer believes it has now made pass.

remaining_failures.description: Failing tests the fixer could NOT resolve this cycle (still expected to fail).

needs_decision.description: TRUE when a failure can only be resolved by a product/architecture decision the fixer must not make alone (ambiguous intended behaviour, a destructive or wide-reaching change, a genuinely flaky/environmental failure). When true, do NOT edit files — populate open_questions and stop.

open_questions.description: Populated when needs_decision=true. Each entry is one concrete question a human must answer before the fix can proceed.

confidence.description: The fixer's confidence (0-1) that this cycle's change makes the targeted tests pass.
